title: physaria floribunda subsp. osterhoutii
intro: Physaria floribunda subsp. osterhoutii, also known as Osterhout's bladderpod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Physaria floribunda subsp. osterhoutii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
